reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación del aca, excelentes baños para socios.  Le falta personal en la playa,siempre hay que esperar para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Very good ACA station, excellent restrooms for members. They need more staff at the pumps; there's always a wait to fill up.

reviews.comment:
En esta estación, está bien el mini mercado, porque nos atendieron muy bien y está muy variado, lo que si, muy caro. Lo que no me gustó fué la playa, es grande la parte de cemento pero chico el sector de surtidores. Además, este sector está descuidado y desprolijo.

(Translated by Google)
At this station, the mini-market is good because the service was excellent and it has a wide variety of products, although it is very expensive. What I didn't like was the forecourt; the concrete area is large, but the pump area is small. Furthermore, this area is neglected and untidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMzlTOHVRRRAB
